candidates.why: Exact top-line revenue label; preferred over Net Sales because it is the broader reported revenue line and matches the target directly.
Not revenue; this is COGS subtotal, so not suitable for REVT.
Also a valid top-line sales label and equals Total Revenue in the preview; useful as fallback if label changes across years.

variables.notes: Use as priority list for revenue labels across years; do not sum.

candidates.why: Direct and exact COGS line item; preferred over subtotal and balancing rows.
Semantically correct but appears unpopulated in the preview; useful as fallback if label changes by year.

candidates.row_label: Finished goods and goods for resale
candidates.why: Inventory asset, not an income statement expense; not suitable for COGS.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods sold - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row, explicitly excluded when a direct COGS row exists.
Valid COGS-style subtotal, but less preferred than the direct component label Cost of goods sold.

variables.notes: Priority list of possible COGS labels across years; do not sum. Direct COGS label is preferred before subtotal.

candidates.why: Clear overhead component within SG&A.
Clear overhead component within SG&A.
Could be overhead in some templates, but this row appears uninformative here and is less specific than explicit selling/admin lines.
Potential SG&A component in some templates, but no evidence here that it is the reported overhead line versus the explicit selling/admin lines.
Overhead/operating bucket and not a total; suitable to capture remaining SG&A-type operating overhead.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A subtotal appears. Selected overhead component rows only; excluded R&D, COGS, depreciation/amortization, totals, and balancing rows.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Capitalized expenditure on development in COGS
candidates.why: R&D-related amortization embedded in COGS, but not the main R&D expense line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in  Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: R&D-related amortization embedded in admin, not the main R&D expense line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Selling expenses
candidates.why: R&D-related amortization embedded in selling, not the main R&D expense line.
Exact reported R&D expense line; best match for XRD.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: A component within R&D, but not the total R&D expense line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental amortization disclosure, not the main R&D expense line.
Balance sheet asset, not period expense.
Balance sheet gross asset, not period expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet accumulated contra-asset, not period expense.

variables.notes: Use the direct R&D expense line only; do not add embedded amortization lines.

candidates.why: Broader finance cost line; usable fallback when a specific interest expense line is unavailable.
Exact preferred interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest subcomponent only; narrower than total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease-interest subcomponent; not preferred as main XINT.
Balancing row, not preferred when actual interest line exists.

variables.notes: Priority list for interest expense across years; prefer specific Interest Expense, then broader Financial expenses if needed.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, per rule.
Usable only if no parent/owner equity line exists; here it duplicates parent equity so the parent-attributable label is preferred.
Balancing row, not an equity line item.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not an equity line item.
Total assets/equity+liabilities control total, not book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list for book equity; parent-attributable equity is preferred to avoid double counting MIB. Total Equity included only as fallback if label changes across years.
No non-controlling interest/minority interest line is present on the provided balance sheet. Since BE uses parent-attributable equity, MIB should be 0.
